channel.title: My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Blog
item.description: MyBlog Install hugo brew install hugo ==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/hugo/manifests/0.100.2 ==> Downloading https://ghcr.io/v2/homebrew/core/hugo/blobs/sha256:0b38ebc6b23ec ==> Downloading from https://pkg-containers.githubusercontent.com/ghcr1/blobs/sh ==> Pouring hugo–0.100.2.big_sur.bottle.tar.gz ==> Caveats zsh completions have been installed to: /usr/local/share/zsh/site-functions ==> Summary 🍺 /usr/local/Cellar/hugo/0.100.2: 48 files, 58.4MB ==> Running brew cleanup hugo… Disable this behaviour by setting HOMEBREW_NO_INSTALL_CLEANUP. Hide these hints with HOMEBREW_NO_ENV_HINTS (see man brew). Install finish hugo version hugo v0.100.2+extended darwin/amd64 BuildDate=unknown xujian@xujians-iMac ~ % hugo new site myblog Congratulations! Your new Hugo site is created in /Users/xujian/myblog.
